title: allium carinatum var. flexum
intro: Allium carinatum var. flexum, also known as the keel-flowered rock garlic or keel-flowered hairy onion, is a perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Allium carinatum var. flexum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural healers.
